pred_reason: The labels SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) are appropriate due to multiple findings of unsafe arithmetic operations and reentrancy vulnerabilities in critical functions. Evidence: Reentrancy vulnerabilities found in fallback and approveAndCall functions (SWC-107); Multiple unsafe arithmetic operations without SafeMath protection (SWC-101); CEI pattern violation in approveAndCall enabling reentrancy (SWC-107)
